en.extract:
The Assam laughingthrush (Trochalopteron chrysopterum) is a species of bird in the family Leiothrichidae. It is found in Northeast India and adjacent southwest China and Myanmar.
The species was formerly regarded as a subspecies of the chestnut-crowned laughingthrush, T. erythrocephalum.


References
en.wikitext:
{{Short description|Species of bird}} {{speciesbox | name = Assam Laughingthrush | image = Assam Laughingthrush Khonoma Nagaland India 23.12.2016.jpg | image_caption = From [[Khonoma Nature Conservation and Tragopan Sanctuary]], [[Nagaland]], [[India]] | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = {{cite iucn |author=BirdLife International |date=2017 |title=''Trochalopteron chrysopterum'' |volume=2017 |article-number=e.T22734483A111152806 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2017-1.RLTS.T22734483A111152806.en |access-date=12 November 2021}} | genus = Trochalopteron | species = chrysopterum | authority = ([[John Gould|Gould]], 1835) | synonyms = Garrulax erythrocephalus chrysopterus
''Garrulax chrysopterus'' }} The '''Assam laughingthrush''' ('''''Trochalopteron chrysopterum''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Leiothrichidae]]. It is found in [[Northeast India]] and adjacent [[southwest China]] and [[Myanmar]]. The species was formerly regarded as a subspecies of the [[chestnut-crowned laughingthrush]], ''T. erythrocephalum''. ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Taxonbar|from=Q27075537}} [[Category:Trochalopteron|Assam laughingthrush]] [[Category:Birds of Northeast India]] [[Category:Birds described in 1835|Assam laughingthrush]]

zh.extract:
金翅噪鹛（台湾作阿薩姆噪鶥）（学名：Trochalopteron chrysopterum），是雀形目噪鹛科的一种鸟类。


特征
金翅噪鹛体重约71.7克，翼长约102.1毫米，嘴峰长约23.8毫米，喙宽度约4.6毫米，喙厚度约5.7毫米，跗蹠长约37.7毫米，尾长约114.2毫米。金翅噪鹛在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在密集的中等高度的林地中，食性为杂食性，主要食物来源是陆生无脊椎动物。


亚种
T. c. chrysopterum：分布于南阿萨姆邦（布拉马普特拉河以南）的山地森林。
T. c. godwini：分布于阿萨姆邦东南部的山地森林。
T. c. erythrolaemum：分布于东曼尼普尔和缅甸西南部。
T. c. woodi：分布于缅甸东北部（克钦邦和北掸邦）和邻近的云南西南部地区。
T. c. ailaoshanense：分布于中国南部（云南哀牢山）。
